
```{r re-try other codes to filter amr strains}

result_Mcat_Hinflu_microreact2 <-
  left_join_amr_sample_df(hflu_extract_sample_df,
                          Hinflu_SA_amr_wide_df,
                          by_cols = "npg_run_id",
                          fill_value = "Absent") %>%
  dplyr::select(where(~ !all(.x == "Absence", na.rm = TRUE)))
result_Mcat_Hinflu_microreact2
```

```{r export file microreact file}
write.table(result_Mcat_microreact2,
            file = "./microreact_analysis/Mcat_microreact2.csv",
            sep = ",",
            col.names = TRUE,
            row.names = FALSE,
            quote = FALSE)
 
```
 
## We will find the capsule of each isolated *H.influenzae* strains with bioinformatic Hicap software 

```{bash convert all *gff files from 4thfilter_Hinfluenzae to *fa files with assemblies}
for f in /rds/general/user/skaing/home/4thfilter_Hinfluenzae/*.gff; do g=`basename $f`; cp -s ../assemblies/${g%gff}fa .; done
```

```{bash command line for bioinformatic analysis of Hicap with each strains of H.influenzae capsule}
declare -i N; N=1; for f in *.fa; do echo 'eval "$(~/miniforge3/bin/conda shell.bash hook)"' > hicap_job.$N; echo -en "conda activate hicap_env\ncd /rds/general/user/skaing/home/NP_AMR/hicap\nmkdir ${f%.fa}.cps.
out\nhicap -q ${f} -o ${f%.fa}.cps.out\n" >> hicap_job.$N; chmod +x hicap_job.$N; N=($N+1); done
```

```{bash command line for extracting all the file}

echo -e "isolate\tpredicted_serotype\n";for f in *cps.out/*tsv; do perl -lane 'if ($F[0] !~ /isolate/ && $F[2] eq "full_gene_complement") {print $F[0]."\t".$F[1];}' $f; done > all_hicap4_hflu.tab
```

```{r import file of all_hicap3_hflu.tab after ran command with Hicap software}

Hicap_hflu <-
  read.table("./amr_hicap_analysis/all_hicap4_hflu.tab",
                         header = TRUE, 
                         comment.char = "",
                         check.names = FALSE,
                         quote = "",
                         sep = "\t") %>% 
      dplyr::mutate(serotype =
                      dplyr::if_else(grepl("truncated_genes",status),
                                           paste0(serotype," (inactivated)"),
                                           serotype)
                                     ) %>% 
      dplyr::select(-status)
```

```{r merge Hicap_hflu with hflu_extract_sample_df by "npg_run_id"}

Hflu_microreact_df <-
  left_join(hflu_extract_sample_df,
            Hicap_hflu,
            by = "npg_run_id") %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(serotype = dplyr::if_else(is.na(serotype),"NT",serotype))

Hflu_microreact_df
```

```{r merge Hflu_microreact_df with result_Mcat_Hinflu_microreact2 and Mcat_Hflu_mobsuite_summary_df by "npg_run_id"}

Hflu_microreact_df_2 <- Hflu_microreact_df %>% 
  select(npg_run_id, serotype) %>% 
  left_join(result_Mcat_Hinflu_microreact2, 
            by = "npg_run_id") %>%
  left_join(Mcat_Hflu_mobsuite_summary_df, 
            by = "npg_run_id") %>%
  dplyr::mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), "Absent", .x))) %>% 
  dplyr::select(where(~ !all(.x=="Absent"))) %>% 
  dplyr::mutate(serotype = dplyr::if_else(is.na(serotype),"NT",serotype)) %>% 
  rename(id = npg_run_id)

Hflu_microreact_df_2

```

```{r export the file from microreact}

write.table(Hflu_microreact_resistnace,
            file = "./microreact_analysis/Hflu_microreact_resistant.csv",
            sep = ",",
            col.names = TRUE,
            row.names = FALSE,
            quote = FALSE)
```

```{r export the file from microreact}

write.table(Hflu_microreact_df,
            file = "./microreact_analysis/Hinflu_microreact.csv",
            sep = ",",
            col.names = TRUE,
            row.names = FALSE,
            quote = FALSE)
```

```{r export the file from after running Mob Suite to find plasmid then import file into microreact}

write.table(Hflu_microreact_df_2,
            file = "./Mob_suite_resistant_plasmid/Hinflu_mobsuite_microreact2.csv",
            sep = ",",
            col.names = TRUE,
            row.names = FALSE,
            quote = FALSE)
```

```{r merge two file of Hflu_microreact_df_2 and Hflu_microreact_resistnace for H.influenzae isolates}

Hinflu_amr_mobsuite <- left_join(Hflu_microreact_df_2,
                                 Hflu_microreact_resistnace,
                                 by = "id") %>%
  select(-Country.y, -Year.y, -Species.y, -Cluster.y, -serotype.y) %>%
  rename(Country = Country.x, 
         Year = Year.x,
         Species = Species.x,
         Cluster = Cluster.x,
         serotype = serotype.x) %>%
  select(where(~ !all(.x == "Absent", na.rm = TRUE)))

Hinflu_amr_mobsuite

```

```{r extract csv file of Hinflu_amr_mobsuite}
write.table(Hinflu_amr_mobsuite,
            file = "./microreact_analysis/Hinflu_amr_mobsuite.csv",
            sep = ",",
            col.names = TRUE,
            row.names = FALSE,
            quote = FALSE)
```



## We try to find % of isolates carrying different resistance genes of *M.cattarrhalis* in different countries

```{r merge data of Mcat_SA_amr_wide and mcat_strains_sample by "npg_run_id"}

mcat_genes_amr <- 
  left_join(mcat_strains_sample, 
            Mcat_SA_amr_wide,
            by = "npg_run_id")
mcat_genes_amr
```

```{r convert gene columns to long format then count resistance genes per country not per isolate}

Mcat_genes_amr_long <- mcat_genes_amr %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(npg_run_id, Country, Year, Species, Classification, Cluster),
    names_to = "Resistant_Gene",
    values_to = "Status_Resistant_Genes") %>%
  group_by(Country, Resistant_Gene) %>%
  summarise(Total = n(),
            Present = sum(Status_Resistant_Genes == "Present", na.rm = TRUE),
            Percent_present = (Present /Total) * 100, 
            .groups = "drop")
Mcat_genes_amr_long
```

```{r plot geom_tile show the distribution of resistance genes by country and by strain}

ggplot(Mcat_genes_amr_long, aes(x = Resistant_Gene, y = Country, fill = Percent_present)) +
  geom_tile(color = "blue") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "lightyellow", high = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Percentage of M. catarrhalis Isolates Carrying Resistance Genes",
    x = "Resistance Gene",
    y = "Country",
    fill = "% Present"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 40, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )
```

### We try to find % of isolates carrying different resistance genes of *H.influenzae* in different countries

```{r use this data of Hinflu_microreact_df for find percentage of resistant gene in different countries}
Hinflu_genes_amr <- Hinflu_microreact_df %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = -c(id , Country, Year, Species, Cluster),
    names_to = "Hinflu_resistant_gene",
    values_to = "status_resistant_genes") %>% 
  group_by(Country, Hinflu_resistant_gene) %>%
  summarise(Total = n(),
            present = sum(status_resistant_genes != "Absent"),
            percent_present = (present /Total) * 100, 
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  filter(present > 0)

Hinflu_genes_amr

```

```{r plot geom_tile}
ggplot(Hinflu_genes_amr, aes(x = Hinflu_resistant_gene, y = Country, fill = percent_present)) +
  geom_tile(color = "blue") +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "lightyellow", high = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Percentage of H.influenzae Isolates Carrying Resistance Genes",
    x = "Resistance Gene",
    y = "Country",
    fill = "% Present"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 40, hjust = 1),
    panel.grid = element_blank()
  )

```

## Compare gene frequencies between samples
